season_structure: The team holds two practices per week and typically plays one to two games per week during the season. Days and times vary — all scheduling is posted in the GameChanger app. We may also participate in local tournaments, though that's still to be determined.
communication_note: All schedule updates, practice times, and game logistics are managed through the GameChanger app. Families should download the app and join the team. Coaching staff will respond the same day when possible.
attendance: Consistent attendance is essential for player development and team preparation.
development: Players will learn and play all positions throughout the season. Certain positions may be emphasized based on individual development needs. Playing time emphasizes development, effort, attitude, and team needs. Roles may evolve throughout the season.
uniform: Players are expected to wear the correct team uniform for games and maintain all equipment in safe, proper condition. Coaches may remove unsafe or inappropriate equipment from use.
liability: Participation in baseball involves inherent risk. The Lawrence Haymakers organization, coaches, staff, and volunteers are not liable for injuries sustained during team activities except where required by law. Parents and guardians are responsible for ensuring appropriate medical coverage for their player.
